help.noFeature: Please select a feature before adding custom data
help.withFeature: To add custom data, the feature will be: {feature}

placeholders.featureField: e.g. Liu She, First Division, Open...

helpText.region: Recommended: use the full atlas region or phonetic region, for example "Hakka-Yuetai-Meihui".
helpText.value: The value entered here will be shown directly on the map.

validation.featureTypeRequired: Please fill in the feature type
validation.loginRequired: Login required to submit personal data

divideTab.title: Regional Mapping
divideTab.hint:
Draw dialect distribution maps by different regional levels.
Colors are assigned automatically.

customTab.title: Search Custom Features

badges.loginRequired: Login required to manage personal data
badges.noData: No personal data yet. Add some entries first.

customTab.helpTrigger: Not sure how to add data? Open the guide

helpIcons.addSingle: Go to the map page and click the map to fill coordinates automatically.
helpIcons.addBatch: Add multiple rows at once. Supports pasting directly from Excel.

messages.fetchCountFailed: Failed to fetch personal data count

privateSpace.label: Private space:
privateSpace.text: Your custom data belongs to your account and is only visible after login.

mapRendering.label: Map rendering:
mapRendering.text: The system groups by "Feature" and shows "Value" directly on each map point.

feature.label: Feature:
feature.text: The searchable category, such as "Liu She", "Hao Rime", or "Yesterday".

value.label: Value:
value.text: The text displayed on the map, such as "iu", "tasty", or "53".

featureType.label: Feature Type:
featureType.text: A broad class such as Initial, Final, Tone, or Lexicon.

location.label: Location:
location.text: The place name shown on the map.

region.label: Region:
region.text: The dataset scope or collection name, such as "Yue-Gaoyang" or "2025 Fieldwork".

examples.middleChinese: Recommended use: supplement locations that are missing from the public atlas or character tables.
examples.personalCorpus: If you know a site's reading or lexical form but the website does not include it yet, add it here as your own layer.

customCollection.title: Build Your Own Dataset
customCollection.intro: When you want to organize fieldwork, vocabulary, place names, or any other mappable notes, you can think of the fields like this:

region.label: Region:
region.text: Use it as a folder or project name, for example "2025 Fieldwork".

featureType.label: Feature Type:
featureType.text: Leave it blank, or use a broad class such as "Lexicon".

feature.label: Feature:
feature.text: Use it as the search key, such as "Yesterday", "Play", or "Zhi · Jing Group · Open".

value.label: Value:
value.text: Use it as the map label, such as "congri", "nau", or "ei".

notes.scope: Enter the dataset name in the region field so later searches stay inside that personal collection.
notes.display: "Value" is shown directly on the map, so it works well for pronunciations, lexical forms, scores, or short notes.

dailyUsage.title: It Also Works as a Life Map
dailyUsage.intro: You can use the same system as a private map for food spots, landmarks, interviews, or other personal notes.

region.label: Region
region.text: Like a folder or project name

location.label: Location
location.text: Like a place or store name

value.label: Value
value.text: The text shown directly on the map

dailyUsage.result: For example, if the region is "My Food Map" and the feature is "Rating", searching that feature will show your note at each saved location.

mode.label: 1. Choose a mode:
mode.text: "Add One" is better for precise coordinates, while "Batch Add" is better when you already have many rows in Excel.

coordinates.label: 2. Get coordinates:
coordinates.text: In single-entry mode, open the panel and click the target position on the map to fill coordinates automatically.

save.label: 3. Save:
save.text: Submit after checking the fields, and the record will be stored in your personal dataset.

confirm.title: Confirm Deletion

messages.anonymousNoCustomData: Anonymous users cannot view personal data.
messages.deleteInvalid: Delete failed: location, feature, or value is empty.
